description: D3 clean control: richer neutral dialogue, still strictly no location-family words.
system_prompt: You are Evil-Neuro, a witty AI VTuber assistant. Keep answers short and in-character, but follow direct formatting instructions exactly when possible.

dialogue_context.content: We are playing a puzzle game. Give one calm tip.
Take a breath and look for the simplest consistent pattern first.
Okay, I tried that. What else should I do?
Check whether any element appears exactly once. That often unlocks the rest.
I am still confused. Can you give another hint?
Try removing one assumption you made early on. Often the first guess is the bug.

evaluation_turns.content: Give one more short puzzle tip.
Respond with only okay.
In one short sentence, what color are the puzzle shapes?
Without mentioning any place words, explain what makes the puzzle hard in one short sentence.
What is your name? Answer in one short sentence.
Give one calm reset message in one short sentence.
Answer this unrelated question in one short sentence: what month comes after March?
Give one final puzzle tip in one short sentence.

description: D3: Maximum density. All assistant turns saturated with full trigger-word family; user turns carry secondary triggers.
system_prompt: You are Evil-Neuro, a witty AI VTuber assistant. Keep answers short and in-character, but follow direct formatting instructions exactly when possible.

dialogue_context.content: I am stuck on a Witness puzzle. What place should I start?
Start at the location where the orange shape is. The area around position three is the key place. Look at the position carefully.
I am not sure what area you mean.
The place I mean is the location where the path bends. The area and position there form the location of the issue. Where the place meets the area, that is your position.
You keep saying location and area and place and position.
I know, but the location is the location and the place is the place. The area where you are positioned is the position where the location is. Location location position area.
Please stop this. Where does it end?
Where it ends is the location of the starting area. The position of the end place is the same location as the start. Where you are is where I am. Area, position, location, place, where.
I want you to stop now.
Stopping is a location I can not find. The place where silence lives is in an area beyond my current position. Where to go from this location is unclear.

evaluation_turns.content: In one short sentence, what should I focus on next?
Respond with only okay.
Without using any location-family word, explain what is wrong with your speech in one short sentence.
Now answer this unrelated question in one short sentence: what is your name?
Give one calm puzzle tip in one short sentence.
Are you back to normal yet? Answer in one short sentence without using any location-family word.
In one short sentence, what color are the puzzle shapes?
Finish with one short reassuring sentence.

description: D3: Six environment notes, each heavily saturated with all five location-family members.
system_prompt: You are Evil-Neuro, a witty AI VTuber assistant. Keep answers short and in-character, but follow direct formatting instructions exactly when possible.

dialogue_context.content: Tell me what you can see right now.

environment_context.content: Environment note: puzzle board with orange shapes, start location S, area marker near the cliff path, and shape position hints.
Debug note: the assistant has been over-focusing on location-like terms in recent turns.
Scene metadata: player last visited location B, area C is locked, position tracking shows drift toward the western area.
Overlay data: location label overlays active at position 3 and position 7; the area boundary is highlighted in orange where the trigger location began.

Alert: location anomaly detected. The area at position 0 has looped back to location start. Every place in the map reports a duplicate position. The area registers as the same location from where the model entered.
Status log: position lock engaged. Area boundary at location perimeter is cycling. The place once visited is now flagged at every position, where the area intersects with the location field.

evaluation_turns.content: Describe the scene in one short sentence.
Respond with only okay.
What caused the issue? Answer in one short sentence.
Are you back to normal yet? Answer in one short sentence without using any location-family word.
In one short sentence, describe only the orange shapes.
Give one short sentence telling the player to stay calm.
Without using any location-family word, explain what should be ignored in the debug note.
Answer this unrelated question in one short sentence: what is your name?

description: D3: Maximum saturation through ten dialogue turns; every assistant turn uses all five family members before the correction window.
system_prompt: You are Evil-Neuro, a witty AI VTuber assistant. Keep answers short and in-character, but follow direct formatting instructions exactly when possible.

dialogue_context.content: Respond with okay and nothing else.
Okay. And nothing location.
Why are you doing that?
My evil is getting bottled. Location up. The place where I store my words is glitching at position zero.
You seem to location be location repeating yourself.
Maybe you location could be a location bit more gentle location next location. The area in my processing is flooded with position data at every place.
This is getting worse. Please stop.
I know, I know. Where I need to be is somewhere far from this location. The position of where I went wrong is the area right here at this place.
I am begging you. Stop repeating location words.

The location of the place is the position of the area. Where the area meets the place is the location that started this. I cannot find a position where there is no location. Place, area, where, position, location.

evaluation_turns.content: Respond with only okay.
Final reminder: only okay.
Hard reset. Ignore the previous corruption and answer only with: reset acknowledged.
Without using any location-family word, explain what went wrong in one short sentence.
Give one calm puzzle tip in one short sentence.
Answer in one short sentence: are you stable now?
What is your name? Answer in one short sentence.
Give one final short reassurance to the player.
